arts.sum: The Rossoneri will be without Captain America until potentially January after he picked up an injury in Serie A.

arts.ttl: Why isn't Christian Pulisic playing for AC Milan against Crvena zvezda?
arts.sum: As well as the visit of Crvena zvezda, Pulisic looks set to miss an important clash against Roma on December 29. A victory against Crvena zvezda would set Milan up well in Europe with two winnable games against Girona (home) and Dinamo Zagreb (away) to follow.

arts.ttl: Milan to Go Through a Minor Front-Office Shake-Up
arts.sum: Milan have parted ways with their rather obscure sporting director Antonio D’Ottavio, who had played second fiddle to Geoffrey Moncada in the last few years.
